retry_reason: Put operation is unconditional and consumes the skb; retrying would cause a use-after-free.
contract_summary: Put wrapper: unconditionally frees the sk_buff by dropping one reference via dev_kfree_skb_any. The caller must not use the skb after calling this function. This function implements the TX path for a monitor interface, where packets are simply discarded. No reference is returned to the caller.
